tasks.subject: Task 1: Flatten claude-skills/ into skills/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create all 46 skills as flat directories under `skills/<stack>-<skill>/SKILL.md`, then delete `claude-skills/` entirely.

**Files:**
- Create: 43 new `skills/<stack>-<skill>/SKILL.md` files
- Delete: `claude-skills/` (entire directory)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `find skills -name SKILL.md | wc -l` returns 46
- [ ] `claude-skills/` directory is gone
- [ ] Zero content changes to skill text

**Verify:** `find skills -name SKILL.md | wc -l` → `46`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/", "claude-skills/"], "verifyCommand": "find skills -name SKILL.md | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["46 SKILL.md files in skills/", "claude-skills/ deleted", "zero content diff"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update cross-references inside all skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove every reference to `claude-skills/` paths and `templates/` paths inside skill files.

**Files:**
- Modify: any `skills/*/SKILL.md` with stale path strings
- Modify: `.claude/rules/*.md`, `AGENTS.md` (root)

**Verify:** `grep -r "claude-skills/\|templates/" skills/ | grep -v "COPY\|ADD\|FROM"` → zero output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/", ".claude/rules/", "AGENTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r 'claude-skills/' skills/ | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero claude-skills/ refs", "zero templates/ refs (except Docker COPY)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rewrite NextJS scaffold — promote [generate] to [verbatim]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert security-critical [generate] files to [verbatim]; remove all version pins.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Verify:** Scaffold test project → `pnpm build` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["layout.tsx verbatim", "API routes verbatim", "zero version pins", "pnpm build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite FastAPI scaffold — full verbatim, no rsync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `rsync templates/fastapi/` with fully self-contained verbatim skill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` (full rewrite)

**Verify:** Scaffold test → `pytest test/ -v` all green, `ruff check src/` zero errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "pytest test/ -v && ruff check src/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero rsync refs", "all security files verbatim", "no version pins", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite NestJS scaffold — full verbatim, no rsync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `rsync templates/nestjs/` with fully self-contained verbatim skill. No dist/ included.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (full rewrite)

**Verify:** `pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e` all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero rsync refs", "no dist/ in skill", "security files verbatim", "build + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewrite Vite-React scaffold — full verbatim, no rsync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `rsync templates/vite-react/` with fully self-contained verbatim skill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` (full rewrite)

**Verify:** `pnpm build && pnpm test` all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero rsync refs", "nginx security headers verbatim", "env.ts uses import.meta.env only", "build + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Delete templates/ and mcp-server/; update plugin.json to v2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove templates/ and mcp-server/; register all 46 skills in plugin.json v2.0.0.

**Files:**
- Delete: `templates/`, `mcp-server/`, `.mcp.json`
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`, `README.md`

**Verify:** `find . -name '*.ts' -path '*/mcp-server/*' | wc -l` → 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/", "mcp-server/", ".mcp.json", ".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "find . -name '*.ts' -path '*/mcp-server/*' | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["templates/ gone", "mcp-server/ gone", "plugin.json v2.0.0 with 46 skills"]}
```
tasks.activeForm: Removing legacy dirs and upgrading plugin

tasks.subject: Task 8: End-to-end smoke test — all four stacks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify every scaffold skill produces a working project with zero repo file dependency.

**Files:** No repo files modified — verification only.

**Verify:** All four build+test commands pass in isolated /tmp directories.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "see plan steps", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 4 stacks build", "all 4 stacks pass tests", "AGENTS.md version comments correct", "zero broken imports"]}
```
